title: hydrocotyle javanica
intro: Hydrocotyle javanica, also known as the pennywort or Java water spinach, is a type of aquatic plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, attributed with various medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. It is valued for its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health. In herbal preparations, Hydrocotyle javanica is often consumed as a tea, juice, or supplement, with the leaves being used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
